# CWE-307 — Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-307-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: no backoff or lockout on repeated failed logins.
func PasswordLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	if email == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing email", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var hash string
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT hash FROM users WHERE email = ?", email).Scan(&hash)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad creds", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
